project.name: Culvert :: data-pipeline-gcp-bigquery (Java) — placeholder
project.description: Placeholder for the sprint-1 GCP BigQuery adapter — split into three sibling issues (#6 Warehouse, #8 JobControlRepository, #9 FinOpsSink). The first implementing agent (issue #6, the Warehouse impl) should REPLACE THIS ENTIRE FILE with a real pom.xml carrying all three contracts' deps, so the follow-up agents only add classes. Issue bodies are canonical scope.
